title: State Street® Industrial Select Sector SPDR® Premium Income ETF declares $0.2611 dividend
content:
* State Street® Industrial Select Sector SPDR® Premium Income ETF (XLII [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/XLII]) declares $0.2611/share monthly dividend [https://www.ssga.com/us/en/intermediary/resources/documents/etf-dividend-distributions].
 	* 30-Day SEC Yield of 1.11% as of Dec. 24.
 	* Payable Dec. 31; for shareholders of record Dec. 29; ex-div Dec. 29.
 	* See XLII Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth. [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/XLII/dividends?source=news_bullet]
